query:
-- First delete request_dates for requests belonging to employees
DELETE rd FROM request_dates rd
INNER JOIN vacation_requests vr ON rd.request_id = vr.id
INNER JOIN employees e ON vr.employee_id = e.id
WHERE e.role = 'employee';

-- Delete vacation requests belonging to employees
DELETE vr FROM vacation_requests vr
INNER JOIN employees e ON vr.employee_id = e.id
WHERE e.role = 'employee';

-- Delete audit log entries for employees
DELETE al FROM audit_log al
INNER JOIN employees e ON al.actor_id = e.id
WHERE e.role = 'employee';

-- Finally delete the employee accounts
DELETE FROM employees WHERE role = 'employee';
